data.name: Coffee & Boobs
data.detailed_description:
💖 RELEASE VERY SOON 💖


關於此遊戲

咖啡……多少奇妙的冒險都是從喝一口這種提神的飲料開始的！一杯咖啡的邀請背後有多少個辛辣的故事！現在很難想像沒有它的世界。我們英雄生活中的奇妙事件始於咖啡。

加入這個想成為歷史上最偉大的咖啡師學徒的年輕人的行列。當我們的主角發現自己身處一家舒適的咖啡館的屋頂下時，他很快就會意識到這裡的員工會偷走他的心，並在他熾熱的夢中安頓很長一段時間！誰會錯過這樣一個實現夢想的機會，甚至還有迷人又熱情的女孩陪伴呢？

  • 欣賞舒適好客的視覺效果

  • 多種浪漫的興趣，只有您的選擇才能決定您將與誰共度良宵。

  • 一個有趣、輕鬆的故事，帶有一點戲劇性和咖啡的味道

  • 由你的選擇決定的多個結局

  • 選擇熟悉的道路或敢於嘗試！

  • 準備好迎接辛辣的驚喜吧！

  • 為自己沖一杯咖啡，享受這個故事！
data.about_the_game:
咖啡……多少奇妙的冒險都是從喝一口這種提神的飲料開始的！一杯咖啡的邀請背後有多少個辛辣的故事！現在很難想像沒有它的世界。我們英雄生活中的奇妙事件始於咖啡。

  • 欣賞舒適好客的視覺效果

  • 多種浪漫的興趣，只有您的選擇才能決定您將與誰共度良宵。

  • 一個有趣、輕鬆的故事，帶有一點戲劇性和咖啡的味道

  • 由你的選擇決定的多個結局

  • 選擇熟悉的道路或敢於嘗試！

  • 準備好迎接辛辣的驚喜吧！

  • 為自己沖一杯咖啡，享受這個故事！
data.short_description: 咖啡與巨乳 是一部 2D 視覺小說，講述了一家舒適的咖啡店，店裡的員工比早晨的濃縮咖啡還要熱情。幫助英雄實現他的夢想 - 成為最偉大的咖啡師，煮出讓任何約會都成功的咖啡！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 俄文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 波蘭文, 阿拉伯文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 日文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Coffee & Boobs
data.detailed_description:
💖 RELEASE VERY SOON 💖


About the Game

Coffee... How many amazing adventures have started with a sip of this invigorating beverage! How many spicy stories followed the invitation for a cup of coffee! Now it is hard to imagine the world without it. And the amazing events in the life of our hero began with coffee.

Join the young man who wants to become an apprentice of the greatest barista in history. Finding himself under the roof of a cozy cafe, our hero will quickly realize that the staff here will steal his heart and settle in his hot dreams for a long time! Who would miss such an opportunity - to fulfill his dream, and even in the company of charming and passionate girls?

  • Admire the cozy and hospitable visuals

  • Several romantic interests, and only your choice will determine with whom you will have spend the night.

  • A funny and light story with a pinch of drama and coffee flavor

  • Multiple endings dictated by your choices

  • Choose the familiar path or dare to experiment!

  • Be ready for spicy surprises!

  • Brew yourself a coffee and enjoy this story!

data.short_description: Coffee & Boobs is a 2D visual novel about a cozy coffee shop where the staff is hotter than a morning espresso. Help the hero fulfill his dream - to become the greatest barista and brew the kind of coffee that will make any date a success!
data.supported_languages:
English, Russian*, French, Italian, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Polish, Arabic, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Turkish, Japanese, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • Processor: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
